summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification - ALL 15 TESTS PASSED. Verified transaction rollback safety fix (transactionFinished flag) and UTXO multi-output precision fix (satoshi-level integer arithmetic). Backend compiles with zero TypeScript errors and webhook endpoint is responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Transaction Rollback Safety: transactionFinished flag properly declared and set before all commit/rollback operations
✓ Catch Block Safety: Properly checks !transactionFinished before attempting cleanup to prevent 'Transaction cannot be rolled back because it has been finished' error
✓ UTXO Precision Fix: Math.round(... * 1e8) used for totalInputSats, feeSats, adminSats to ensure <=8 decimal places
✓ Values Divided Back: merchantSendAmount, adminAmount, exactFee all derived from satoshi values divided by 1e8
✓ Direct-to-Admin Path: Also uses satoshi arithmetic (inputSats, feeSats, outputSats)
✓ toUTXO Values: Correctly use merchantSendAmount and adminAmount variables (not raw calculations)
✓ Payment Flow Order: settleCryptoTransaction is called BEFORE status update, result logged, THEN commit
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes verified: 1) transactionFinished flag prevents double-finish errors - 8 occurrences in cryptoVerification function, catch block checks flag before cleanup. 2) UTXO multi-output uses satoshi arithmetic (Math.round * 1e8) to ensure Tatum API accepts values with <=8 decimal places. 3) Payment status 'successful' is only set AFTER settleCryptoTransaction completes successfully. Backend running on port 8001, webhook endpoint at /api/tatum-crypto-webhook is responsive.

bug_1_transaction_rollback.root_cause: Transaction was being committed or rolled back, then catch block tried to rollback again
bug_1_transaction_rollback.fix_applied: Added transactionFinished boolean flag, set to true before every commit/rollback, catch block checks !transactionFinished before cleanup
verification: transactionFinished = true appears 8 times in cryptoVerification
Catch block at line 4863 checks if (!transactionFinished) before attempting cleanup

bug_2_utxo_precision.root_cause: Floating-point arithmetic created values with >8 decimal places, rejected by Tatum API
bug_2_utxo_precision.fix_applied: Use satoshi-level integer arithmetic: Math.round(value * 1e8), compute in integers, divide back by 1e8
verification: Lines 3167-3169: totalInputSats, feeSats, adminSats use Math.round(...* 1e8)
Lines 3177-3179: adminAmount, merchantSendAmount, exactFee derived from satoshi values / 1e8
Lines 2939-2940: Direct-to-admin path also uses satoshi arithmetic

requirement_status_after_sweep.verification: settleCryptoTransaction called at line 4159, result logged, commit at line 4558, status='successful' set at lines 4575, 4580 (all AFTER settlement)
